word: H2013 - הָסָה - hâçâh - haw-saw' - Hold peace

sections.paragraph:
Original: הסה

Transliteration: hâsâh

Phonetic: haw-saw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Piel) hush, keep silence, be silent, hold peace, hold tongue, still (interjection)
  2. (CLBL) to hush (verb)
    1. (Hiphil) to command to be silent

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 511

Part(s) of speech:
